calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner, Alec Steiner, minor's father, present in pro per, was sworn and examined. Minor's mother, Tamila Shteyner, present.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to EUGENE STEINER.
Decree signed in open court.
